data.body:
GAP_ANALYSIS_AMENDMENT: Add AC7 and AC8 for gap findings.

AC7: Contract specifies canonical signal string (parseable format)
The contract must include the exact canonical signal string 'REPLAN_ESCALATE: brainstorm EXPLANATION:' (with colon-space-prefix) as the literal parsing prefix, so that bd1a-14a3 and 43d6-4603 assert/implement the same string.
Verify: grep -q "REPLAN_ESCALATE: brainstorm EXPLANATION:" plugins/dso/docs/contracts/replan-escalate-signal.md && echo PASS

AC8: Contract specifies REPLAN_ESCALATE is a terminal signal (no further tasks emitted after it)
The contract must document that after emitting REPLAN_ESCALATE, implementation-plan MUST stop all task decomposition immediately and return the signal as its final output.
Verify: grep -q 'terminal\|halt\|stop\|final output' plugins/dso/docs/contracts/replan-escalate-signal.md && echo PASS

Source: Gap analysis finding 1 (scope_gap: parseable format validation) and finding 3 (missing_error_path: terminal signal behavior)
